_comment: diagnostic-gauge-citation-lint escapes (SD-LEO-INFRA-REWARD-SPINE-ONE-001-C). files: confirmed pre-existing citations of a diagnostic-only signal (retrospectives.quality_score / feedback.quality_score / adherence-probe pass-rate / raw gate pass-rate) as a gating threshold, accepted as known debt pending a dedicated remediation SD -- NOT a permanent exemption. A --all sweep during PLAN research found this backlog is 18 files, not the single file (retrospective-quality.js) originally assumed in the SD's design brief -- documented honestly rather than minimized. Some entries are borderline (e.g. stage-17-blueprint-review.js filters for a positive value rather than a meaningful threshold, and may be a different domain's quality_score entirely) but are included rather than hand-pruned, matching schema-reference-lint.mjs's own advisory-backlog philosophy. Prefer the inline pragma (diagnostic-gauge-lint-disable-line) for a single new intentional line.
